$comment: Skills the hero-vibe-kit workflow references. The `process` core skills are VENDORED (a curated, lightly trimmed MIT-licensed copy) under templates/skills/ and installed by init/update into .claude/skills/ — no `skills` CLI needed (attribution: templates/skills/NOTICE). Design/taste skills are NOT bundled — they are referenced here and (optionally, with consent) installed via the `skills` CLI from their ORIGINAL sources. See docs: TEAM_ROSTER / AGENCY_WORKFLOW.

process.description: Core process skills the workflow invokes by name. Vendored under templates/skills/ and installed into .claude/skills/ by init/update (curated, lightly trimmed copy of obra/superpowers; attribution in templates/skills/NOTICE). The workflow still runs without them (gates/hooks/router intact) but loses skill-guided depth.

brand.description: Brand/identity skill. Use once per product/brand.

design-direction.description: Visual-direction taste systems. Pick EXACTLY ONE per project (DESIGN_STANDARDS §3).

design-tools.description: Complementary design tools — install as needed (not mutually exclusive).
